## Change type

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — build, release, CI, or dependency update
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `node ./bin/construct doctor` passes
- [ ] `node ./bin/construct docs:update --check` passes (or I ran `docs:update` and committed)
- [ ] `node ./bin/construct lint:comments` passes
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Files I added have a file-header block (see `rules/common/comments.md`)
- [ ] No point-in-time or caller-reference comments introduced
